features: 🌿 Natural Hair Care - Enriched with organic hemp oil, our shampoo and conditioner provide a natural solution for healthier, shinier hair.
💧 Hydrating & Nourishing - Deeply hydrates and nourishes your hair, ensuring each strand is soft, smooth, and manageable.
🌱 Vegan-Friendly - Our formula is 100% vegan and cruelty-free, offering you ethical hair care without compromising on quality.
🍃 Organic Ingredients - Made with premium organic ingredients, this duo supports sustainable beauty while delivering outstanding results.
✨ Anti-Frizz Formula - Say goodbye to frizz with our specially formulated shampoo and conditioner that tame unruly hair and reduce flyaways.
💪 Strengthening & Repairing - Infused with essential fatty acids and vitamins, it strengthens and repairs hair from root to tip, preventing breakage and split ends.
description: Product description Experience the ultimate in natural hair care with XHC Hemp Shampoo & Conditioner 400ml. Infused with organic hemp oil, this vegan-friendly duo delivers intense hydration and nourishment, leaving your hair soft, shiny, and manageable. The sulphate-free formula is gentle on your scalp and suitable for all hair types, making it an ideal choice for everyone. Rich in essential fatty acids and vitamins, our shampoo and conditioner work together to strengthen and repair your hair from root to tip, reducing frizz and preventing breakage. Embrace the power of nature with XHC Hemp Shampoo & Conditioner, formulated with organic ingredients to provide your hair with the care it deserves. Perfect for those seeking a natural, sustainable, and effective hair care solution, this set is your go-to for healthy, beautiful hair. Try XHC Hemp Shampoo & Conditioner today and transform your hair with the nourishing benefits of hemp. Ingredients Aqua, sodium C14-16 Olefin Sulfonate. Cocamidopropyl Betaine. Propylene Glycol, Cocamide Dea. Sodium Chloride. Dmdm Hydantoin, Perfum, Polyquaternium-10, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein. Cannabis Sative Seed oil, Camellia Sinensis Extract, Citrus Limon (lemon ) peel oil, Disodium Edta. Directions Apply a generous amount of shampoo to wet hair, massage into a lather then rinse thoroughly with clean water. Repeat process if required. Apply conditioner to damp hair and gently massage through hair from roots to tips. Leave on for 3-5 minutes then rinse well with clean water. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. If contract does occur, rinse well with clean water. if irritation occurs discontinue use. Keep out of the reach of children. See more
